name: opencode-warcraft
description: Context-Driven Development for AI coding assistants

scripts.build: bun run --filter warcraft-core build && bun run --filter opencode-warcraft build
scripts.lint: bun run --filter warcraft-core typecheck && bun run --filter opencode-warcraft typecheck && bunx biome check . --diagnostic-level=error
scripts.release:check: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build && bun run test && bun run lint && bun run format:check
